query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(e.id) as count, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_instagram
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
GROUP BY c.id, c.name 
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, COUNT(e.id) as count, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_instagram
FROM establishments e 
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id 
GROUP BY c.id, c.name 
ORDER BY count DESC;
